title: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management policies
description: Desired state for Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management policies consumed by scripts/Deploy-IRMPolicies.ps1. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/insider-risk-management

name.description: Unique policy identifier. Maps to the -Name parameter of New-InsiderRiskPolicy. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchange/new-insiderriskpolicy

description.description: Free-form policy description. Maps to -Comment on New-InsiderRiskPolicy.

scenario.description: IRM scenario template. Maps to the -InsiderRiskScenario parameter of New-InsiderRiskPolicy. The enum below was extracted directly from the PlaybookScenarioType validation error returned by a live Security & Compliance PowerShell session in the lab tenant (issue #267). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchange/new-insiderriskpolicy

enabled.description: Whether the policy is active. When omitted, the cmdlet default applies.
